sme_leads.notes: Home-based beauty salon operating entirely through Facebook (chicbeautyroom) with no standalone website — prime candidate for a professional site with online booking.
Turkish barber listed only on Yell with no own website; local walk-in trade could be boosted significantly with an online presence and booking system.
Barbershop on Shirley Rd with Facebook and Fresha profiles but no dedicated website or custom domain — easy upsell for a simple brochure + booking site.
Active on Facebook, Instagram and Yell but lacks its own website domain; strong local reputation with 100+ reviews makes it a credible inbound prospect.
Running on a free Weeblyte template with no custom domain and poor mobile optimisation — an easy win for a modern, conversion-focused rebuild.

linkedin_prospects.name: Brett Foulser
linkedin_prospects.title: Sales Director
linkedin_prospects.reason: Leads a 52-person sales department across 20 estate agency offices — exactly the multi-branch, high-volume sales environment CloseCoach was built to train.

linkedin_prospects.name: Neil Harrison
linkedin_prospects.title: Sales Manager
linkedin_prospects.reason: Long-tenured sales manager at a family-run Ford dealership in Crewe — small, independent team that would benefit from structured AI-led sales coaching to improve close rates.

linkedin_prospects.name: Peter Griffin
linkedin_prospects.title: Senior Sales Manager
linkedin_prospects.reason: Senior sales manager at an independent UK car group managing a frontline sales team — strong ICP fit for CloseCoach's objection-handling and deal-closing modules.

dts.title: 15 weeks to get a driving test — here's the hack
dts.hook: Open with the DVSA stat (avg 15.1 week wait, some areas 20+ weeks), then reveal that cancelled slots are released daily and show how DTS catches them automatically. CTA: 'stop refreshing DVSA — let DTS do it for you.'

dts.title: DVSA changed the booking rules in 2026 — what every learner needs to know
dts.hook: Explain the new learner-only booking rule (instructors can no longer book on behalf of pupils) and how this creates more last-minute cancellations that DTS is perfectly positioned to catch.

athletics.title: Calisthenics progression — Week X check-in
athletics.hook: Film a weekly skill update (muscle-up, planche lean, L-sit hold) showing measurable progress; pair with VO narrating the training principle behind it. Low-cost, high-authenticity content.

athletics.title: Top 3 sprint drills that improved my acceleration off the blocks
athletics.hook: Film 3 specific acceleration drills (A-skips, resisted sprints, wall drives) at the track with split-time comparisons; end with a 'try this in your next session' CTA to drive engagement and saves.

aimybiz.title: Your sales reps are practising objection handling on your best prospects — there's a better way
aimybiz.hook: Open with a stat or a relatable scenario ('How many deals has your team lost this month to 'I need to think about it'?'), then introduce CloseCoach as the AI sparring partner that lets reps rehearse before the real call. End with a soft CTA to DM for a demo.

aimybiz.title: I asked CloseCoach to roleplay the toughest sales objection — here's what happened
aimybiz.hook: Screen-record or film a live CloseCoach session handling a difficult objection ('your price is too high'), narrate the AI's coaching feedback in real time, and close with 'imagine your team doing this 10 times before their Monday morning calls.'
